contract.governs: Authenticated operator threaded messaging to developers and support ticket display and reply
contract.title: Virtual Launch Pro — Operator Contract — Messages

replyToId.description: eventId of message being replied to — threads messages together

notes.threadingModel: Messages linked by replyToId field. Thread = all messages sharing a root eventId chain for a given ref_number.

additionalEndpoints.name: messageThread
additionalEndpoints.description: Fetch full message thread for a developer by ref. Returns messages in chronological order including inbound replies.
additionalEndpoints.payload: Query param: ref (required VLP- ref number)
additionalEndpoints.response: { ok, ref_number, messages: [{ eventId, subject, body, direction, sentAt, read, replyToId }] }

additionalEndpoints.name: ticketList
additionalEndpoints.description: List all support tickets submitted via /forms/support. Optional filter: ?status=open|closed
additionalEndpoints.payload: No body. Optional query param: status
additionalEndpoints.response: { ok, results: [{ ticketId, clientRef, subject, status, submittedAt, replyCount }] }

additionalEndpoints.name: ticketReply
additionalEndpoints.description: Operator reply to a support ticket. Appends reply to ticket thread in R2.
additionalEndpoints.effects: Appends to support-records/{ticketId}/replies/{eventId}.json. Updates ticket status to in_progress if currently open.
